content: Compare the two SparseNeuroVec implementations for structure, completeness, and R consistency
Check which implementation is actually used in tests and other modules
Identify unique features in either implementation that need to be preserved
Provide recommendation on which implementation to keep and consolidation plan
Update all imports to use SparseNeuroVec from neuro_vec.py
Add vectors() method from sparse_neuro_vec.py to the neuro_vec.py implementation
Update test files to use the correct import
